---
title: "05c — Score Full Corpus with RoBERTa Antisemitism Classifier"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = TRUE, warning = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas")
source("C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas/_config.R")
```

## Prerequisites check

```{r check-prereqs}
model_dir <- file.path(MODELS_DIR, "roberta_antisemitism")

# Check model exists
if (!file.exists(file.path(model_dir, "model.safetensors")) &&
    !file.exists(file.path(model_dir, "pytorch_model.bin"))) {
  stop("RoBERTa model not found. Run step 05b first: ", model_dir)
}

# Check antisemitism-scored articles exist
input_dir <- file.path(DATA_PARQUET, "articles_antisem_scored")
input_files <- list.files(input_dir, pattern = "\\.parquet$")
message("Input files: ", length(input_files), " year files")

if (length(input_files) == 0) {
  stop("No antisemitism-scored articles found. Run step 03b first.")
}
```

## GPU verification

```{r gpu-check}
library(reticulate)
use_python(PYTHON_EXE, required = TRUE)

py_run_string("
import torch
if torch.cuda.is_available():
    print(f'CUDA available: {torch.cuda.get_device_name(0)}')
    mem_gb = torch.cuda.get_device_properties(0).total_memory / 1e9
    print(f'VRAM: {mem_gb:.1f} GB')
    # Adjust batch size based on VRAM
    if mem_gb >= 16:
        batch_size = 64
    elif mem_gb >= 10:
        batch_size = 32
    else:
        batch_size = 16
    print(f'Recommended inference batch size: {batch_size}')
else:
    print('WARNING: No GPU. CPU inference will be very slow.')
    batch_size = 8
")
```

## Score corpus

```{r score}
dir.create(ROBERTA_SCORED_DIR, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# Check how many are already done
already_done <- list.files(ROBERTA_SCORED_DIR, pattern = "\\.parquet$")
message("Already scored: ", length(already_done), " year files")
message("Remaining: ", length(input_files) - length(already_done))

if (length(already_done) >= length(input_files)) {
  message("All years already scored. Delete output files to re-score.")
} else {
  message("Starting corpus scoring with RoBERTa...")
  message("Estimated time: 1.5-3 hours on GPU")

  source_python(file.path(PROJECT_ROOT, "R", "score_roberta.py"))
  n_scored <- score_corpus(model_dir, input_dir, ROBERTA_SCORED_DIR)

  message("\nScored ", n_scored, " articles total.")
}
```

## Score distribution summary

```{r summary}
library(arrow)
library(data.table)

scored_files <- list.files(ROBERTA_SCORED_DIR, pattern = "\\.parquet$",
                           full.names = TRUE)

if (length(scored_files) > 0) {
  ds <- open_dataset(scored_files)

  score_summary <- ds |>
    dplyr::summarise(
      n_articles = n(),
      mean_p_antisem = mean(p_antisem, na.rm = TRUE),
      sd_p_antisem = sd(p_antisem, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_p_antisem = median(p_antisem, na.rm = TRUE),
      share_above_50 = mean(p_antisem > 0.5, na.rm = TRUE),
      share_above_75 = mean(p_antisem > 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
      p90 = quantile(p_antisem, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE),
      p99 = quantile(p_antisem, 0.99, na.rm = TRUE)
    ) |>
    dplyr::collect()

  print(score_summary)

  # By decade
  decade_scores <- ds |>
    dplyr::mutate(decade = as.integer(year / 10) * 10L) |>
    dplyr::group_by(decade) |>
    dplyr::summarise(
      n = n(),
      mean_p = mean(p_antisem, na.rm = TRUE),
      share_above_50 = mean(p_antisem > 0.5, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) |>
    dplyr::collect() |>
    dplyr::arrange(decade)

  print(decade_scores)

  # Histogram
  library(ggplot2)
  sample_scores <- ds |>
    dplyr::select(p_antisem) |>
    dplyr::collect()

  p_hist <- ggplot(sample_scores, aes(x = p_antisem)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 100, fill = "steelblue", color = "white", alpha = 0.8) +
    scale_y_log10() +
    labs(x = "P(Antisemitic)", y = "Count (log scale)",
         title = "Distribution of RoBERTa Antisemitism Scores") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12)

  save_figure(p_hist, "fig_antisem_score_distribution", width = 8, height = 5)
  print(p_hist)
} else {
  message("No scored files found.")
}
```
